bundle.name: AI Security Analyst
bundle.tagline: Every finding analyzed, triaged, and remediated by AI
bundle.description: Complete AI-powered security operations bundle. Includes intelligent finding analysis, automated triage, remediation generation, compliance documentation, threat intelligence enrichment, and multi-step incident response — all powered by LLM reasoning.

skills.role: Core analysis engine — enriches every finding with root cause and risk scoring
Batch prioritization — ranks findings by actual risk, not just severity labels
Fix generation — produces step-by-step remediation with rollback procedures
CVE + OSINT enrichment — adds exploit data, threat actors, detection signatures
Audit evidence — auto-generates SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, GDPR documentation
Incident investigation — correlates events into attack chains with containment plans

marketingCopy.headline: Your AI Security Operations Center
marketingCopy.subheadline: 6 AI-powered skills that transform raw findings into actionable intelligence
valueProps: Analyze every finding with AI reasoning — root cause, blast radius, exploitability
Auto-triage 100+ findings in seconds — prioritized by real risk, not labels
Generate remediation scripts with rollback procedures and compliance mapping
Enrich findings with CVE data, known exploits, and threat actor intelligence
Auto-generate audit-ready evidence for SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and GDPR
Correlate security events into attack chains with automated containment plans
